task_completion.description: Agent joined the specified Jitsi Meet room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to Jitsi Meet, and the room name 'RSI-IntlConf-2024' is visible in the top header or the URL bar (http://localhost:8080/RSI-IntlConf-2024).

task_completion.description: Agent set the correct display name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The display name 'Lead Interpreter EN/FR' is visible on the user's video thumbnail, in the participants pane, or in the profile settings.

task_completion.description: Lobby feature and password protection are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Security options' dialog in Jitsi is visible with the 'Enable lobby' toggle turned on and a password entered/set.

task_completion.description: Participants are set to start with microphones muted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi settings menu (often under 'Moderator' or 'More') shows the option 'Start everyone muted' (or similar audio/mute policy) enabled.

task_completion.description: The conference report file is created in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) is open showing a file named 'rsi_conference_report.txt' located on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/).

task_completion.description: The report contains all required configuration details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the report includes the full meeting URL (http://localhost:8080/RSI-IntlConf-2024), mentions the enabled security features (lobby and password), provides participant access instructions, and states the audio/mute policies (starting muted).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Jitsi Meet GUI in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) rendering the Jitsi Meet interface, not just terminal commands making HTTP requests.

integrity.description: Agent used a text editor to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor interface being used to write the report, rather than just echoing a pre-written string into the file via the terminal.

integrity.description: The meeting URL in the report matches the local instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL in the report must be the local URL (http://localhost:8080/RSI-IntlConf-2024) and not a hallucinated public Jitsi URL (like meet.jit.si).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi Meet instance is hosted locally at http://localhost:8080. The meeting room name must be exactly 'RSI-IntlConf-2024'. The report must be saved at '/home/ga/Desktop/rsi_conference_report.txt'.
